theory.intro: You can multiply a large number by splitting it into its place-value parts, multiplying each part, then adding. This is the **distributive property**.
facts: Multiply **each part** by the multiplier, then add the part-products.
An **area model** shows the parts as rectangles whose areas are the part-products.
steps: Split the larger number into hundreds, tens and ones.
Multiply each part by the other factor.
Add the part-products to get the total.
